requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility / Radio — Household Appliances and INACOM (Angola)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容/无线电——家用器具与INACOM（安哥拉）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容/無線電——家用器具與INACOM（安哥拉）

summary.en: Angola does not operate an EU-style standalone horizontal EMC directive for household appliances. Where EMC characteristics are assessed, IANORQ relies on Angolan national standards (NA) adopted from the international CISPR / IEC 61000 framework — for household appliances the relevant emission basis is CISPR 14-1 and the immunity basis is CISPR 14-2 (the international parents of the appliance EMC family). Conventional household refrigerators with no radio function are treated mainly as an electrical-safety and import-inspection matter, with EMC evidence expected to follow the IEC/CISPR base if requested at inspection. Separately, radio and telecom equipment in Angola is regulated by INACOM (Instituto Angolano das Comunicacoes), the national communications regulator: any refrigerator with wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features) falls under INACOM type-approval / homologation for the radio module and would additionally require an importer and Portuguese documentation. A plain non-connected refrigerator does not require INACOM approval.
summary.zh: 安哥拉不实行欧盟式独立的家用器具横向电磁兼容指令。在需要评估电磁兼容特性时，IANORQ依据采纳自国际CISPR/IEC 61000框架的安哥拉国家标准（NA）——家用器具适用的发射基础为CISPR 14-1，抗扰度基础为CISPR 14-2（器具电磁兼容族标准的国际母体）。无无线电功能的常规家用电冰箱主要作为电气安全和进口查验事项处理，如查验时被要求提供电磁兼容证据，预期遵循IEC/CISPR基础。另外，安哥拉的无线电和电信设备由国家通信监管机构INACOM（安哥拉通信研究所）监管：任何带无线连接（Wi-Fi或蓝牙智能家居功能）的电冰箱，其无线模块须接受INACOM型式核准/认证，并另需进口商及葡萄牙语文件。普通无连接功能的电冰箱无需INACOM核准。
summary.zht: 安哥拉不實行歐盟式獨立的家用器具橫向電磁相容指令。在需要評估電磁相容特性時，IANORQ依據採納自國際CISPR/IEC 61000框架的安哥拉國家標準（NA）——家用器具適用的發射基礎為CISPR 14-1，抗擾度基礎為CISPR 14-2（器具電磁相容族標準的國際母體）。無無線電功能的常規家用電冰箱主要作為電氣安全和進口查驗事項處理，如查驗時被要求提供電磁相容證據，預期遵循IEC/CISPR基礎。另外，安哥拉的無線電和電信設備由國家通信監管機構INACOM（安哥拉通信研究所）監管：任何帶無線連接（Wi-Fi或藍牙智慧家居功能）的電冰箱，其無線模組須接受INACOM型式核准/認證，並另需進口商及葡萄牙語文件。普通無連接功能的電冰箱無需INACOM核准。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (international basis for Angolan NA where EMC is assessed)
INACOM (Instituto Angolano das Comunicacoes) — radio/telecom type-approval / homologation (applies only if the appliance contains a wireless module)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are mandatory and enforced under the CCC regime: GB 4343.1-2018 (emission limits and measurement methods; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1 for harmonic current emissions where applicable. CCC for refrigerators bundles both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1). For any wireless module, China requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee) type approval. The Chinese GB 4343.1 emission basis (CISPR 14-1) is the same international family used by Angolan NA, so the underlying EMC engineering is closely aligned, though Chinese CCC/SRRC certificates are not themselves Angolan approvals.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求为强制性，在CCC制度下执行：GB 4343.1-2018（发射限值和测量方法；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；等同CISPR 14-2:2015），适用时配合GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）。电冰箱CCC同时涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）。对于任何无线模块，中国要求SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。中国GB 4343.1发射基础（CISPR 14-1）与安哥拉NA所采用的国际族标准相同，因此底层电磁兼容工程高度一致，但中国CCC/SRRC证书本身并非安哥拉核准。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求為強制性，在CCC制度下執行：GB 4343.1-2018（發射限值和測量方法；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；等同CISPR 14-2:2015），適用時配合GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）。電冰箱CCC同時涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）。對於任何無線模組，中國要求SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。中國GB 4343.1發射基礎（CISPR 14-1）與安哥拉NA所採用的國際族標準相同，因此底層電磁相容工程高度一致，但中國CCC/SRRC證書本身並非安哥拉核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
SRRC type approval — required for any embedded wireless module in China

gap.en: For a conventional non-connected refrigerator, the EMC gap is modest and procedural: Angola has no standalone EMC directive, and both Chinese GB 4343.1 and Angolan NA trace to CISPR 14-1, so the engineering content is shared. If EMC evidence is requested at IANORQ import inspection, present IEC/CISPR-based test results (CB-related EMC report or an accredited CISPR 14 report) rather than a CCC certificate citing GB numbers. The material gap arises only for connected (smart) refrigerators: any embedded Wi-Fi or Bluetooth module triggers INACOM radio homologation in Angola — a separate approval from electrical safety — and the Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy it. Confirm with the importer whether the specific model is connected and, if so, budget for INACOM type-approval lead time and Portuguese radio documentation. Note: unlike the EU, Angola does not impose a horizontal harmonic-emission/flicker directive on appliances, so GB 17625.1-style filings are generally not a separate Angolan gate.
gap.zh: 对于常规无连接功能的电冰箱，电磁兼容差距较小且属程序性：安哥拉无独立电磁兼容指令，且中国GB 4343.1与安哥拉NA均溯源于CISPR 14-1，工程内容共享。若IANORQ进口查验要求提供电磁兼容证据，应提交基于IEC/CISPR的检测结果（CB相关电磁兼容报告或经认可的CISPR 14报告），而非引用GB编号的CCC证书。实质差距仅出现在联网（智能）电冰箱：任何嵌入式Wi-Fi或蓝牙模块在安哥拉触发INACOM无线电认证——独立于电气安全的另一项核准——且中国SRRC核准不能满足该要求。请向进口商确认具体型号是否联网，如是，须为INACOM型式核准的周期及葡萄牙语无线电文件预留时间。注：与欧盟不同，安哥拉不对器具施加横向谐波发射/闪烁指令，因此GB 17625.1式申报一般不构成安哥拉的独立门槛。
gap.zht: 對於常規無連接功能的電冰箱，電磁相容差距較小且屬程序性：安哥拉無獨立電磁相容指令，且中國GB 4343.1與安哥拉NA均溯源於CISPR 14-1，工程內容共享。若IANORQ進口查驗要求提供電磁相容證據，應提交基於IEC/CISPR的檢測結果（CB相關電磁相容報告或經認可的CISPR 14報告），而非引用GB編號的CCC證書。實質差距僅出現在聯網（智慧）電冰箱：任何嵌入式Wi-Fi或藍牙模組在安哥拉觸發INACOM無線電認證——獨立於電氣安全的另一項核准——且中國SRRC核准不能滿足該要求。請向進口商確認具體型號是否聯網，如是，須為INACOM型式核准的週期及葡萄牙語無線電文件預留時間。注：與歐盟不同，安哥拉不對器具施加橫向諧波發射/閃爍指令，因此GB 17625.1式申報一般不構成安哥拉的獨立門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no standalone EMC directive for plain appliances; IEC/CISPR 14-based EMC evidence may be requested at IANORQ import inspection. INACOM radio homologation is mandatory only if the appliance contains a wireless module
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1-2018 EMC is part of CCC for refrigerators; SRRC type approval required for any wireless module; enforced by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: INACOM (Instituto Angolano das Comunicacoes) — Angola communications regulator (radio homologation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola has no EU-style standalone EMC directive; for plain refrigerators, IEC/CISPR 14-based evidence (closely aligned with China's GB 4343.1) suffices if EMC is checked at IANORQ import inspection. The real EMC-adjacent gate is INACOM radio homologation, which applies only to connected (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) models — Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy it. Confirm connectivity status and INACOM requirements with the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉无欧盟式独立电磁兼容指令；对于普通电冰箱，若IANORQ进口查验涉及电磁兼容，基于IEC/CISPR 14的证据（与中国GB 4343.1高度一致）即可满足。真正的电磁兼容相邻门槛是INACOM无线电认证，仅适用于联网（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）型号——中国SRRC核准不能满足。请向在地进口商确认联网状态及INACOM要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉無歐盟式獨立電磁相容指令；對於普通電冰箱，若IANORQ進口查驗涉及電磁相容，基於IEC/CISPR 14的證據（與中國GB 4343.1高度一致）即可滿足。真正的電磁相容相鄰門檻是INACOM無線電認證，僅適用於聯網（Wi-Fi/藍牙）型號——中國SRRC核准不能滿足。請向在地進口商確認聯網狀態及INACOM要求。
